Package frc.alotobots.reefscape

Class FieldConstants

java.lang.Object
frc.alotobots.reefscape.FieldConstants
public class FieldConstants extends Object
Constants class containing field-specific positions and measurements for the game field. This includes positions for reef branches, algae positions, and game piece floor positions.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static enum 
    FieldConstants.CoralStationPickupPosition
    Enum representing the available position in coral stations.
    static enum 
    FieldConstants.CoralStationSide
    Enum representing the available coral stations.
    static enum 
    FieldConstants.GamePieceFloorPosition
    Enum representing the possible floor positions for game pieces.
    static enum 
    FieldConstants.Level
    Enum representing the different height levels for branches.
    static enum 
    FieldConstants.ReefAlgaePosition
    Enum representing the algae positions between reef branches.
    static enum 
    FieldConstants.ReefBranch
    Enum representing the available reef branches on the field, labeled A through L in counterclockwise order.

  • Method Details

    • getBranchBlue

      public Pose3d getBranchBlue(FieldConstants.ReefBranch branch, FieldConstants.Level level)
      Gets the blue alliance pose for a branch at a specific level.
      Parameters:
      branch - The reef branch to get the pose for
      level - The height level of the branch
      Returns:
      The Pose3d for the specified branch and level on the blue alliance side
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if no position exists for the specified branch and level

    • getBranchRed

      public Pose3d getBranchRed(FieldConstants.ReefBranch branch, FieldConstants.Level level)
      Gets the red alliance pose for a branch at a specific level.
      Parameters:
      branch - The reef branch to get the pose for
      level - The height level of the branch
      Returns:
      The Pose3d for the specified branch and level on the red alliance side

    • getReefAlgaeBlue

      public Pose3d getReefAlgaeBlue(FieldConstants.ReefAlgaePosition position)
      Gets the blue alliance pose for an algae position between reef branches.
      Parameters:
      position - The algae position to get the pose for
      Returns:
      The Pose3d for the specified algae position on the blue alliance side
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if no position exists for the specified position

    • getReefAlgaeRed

      public Pose3d getReefAlgaeRed(FieldConstants.ReefAlgaePosition position)
      Gets the red alliance pose for an algae position between reef branches.
      Parameters:
      position - The algae position to get the pose for
      Returns:
      The Pose3d for the specified algae position on the red alliance side

    • getFloorBlue

      public Pose3d getFloorBlue(FieldConstants.GamePieceFloorPosition position)
      Gets the blue alliance pose for a game piece floor position.
      Parameters:
      position - The floor position to get the pose for
      Returns:
      The Pose3d for the specified floor position on the blue alliance side
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if no position exists for the specified position

    • getFloorRed

      public Pose3d getFloorRed(FieldConstants.GamePieceFloorPosition position)
      Gets the red alliance pose for a game piece floor position.
      Parameters:
      position - The floor position to get the pose for
      Returns:
      The Pose3d for the specified floor position on the red alliance side
